error_systemNotReady: Invite system is not ready yet
error_notWhitelisted: You are not whitelisted! Ask a friend to run /invite {source}
error_cannotSpecifyPlatform: Cannot specify platform given raw UUID
error_playerNotInTree: Player is not in the invite tree
error_platformAmbiguous: Player exists on both platforms; specify Java or Bedrock
error_nameAmbiguous: Player name is ambiguous; specify Java or Bedrock

error_permissionsApiMissing: Permissions API not present; using operator-level checks. Install fabric-permissions-api to enable permission nodes.
success_alreadyInvited: That player is already invited by you
